title: card::extract_first_url regex matches inside href= attributes, creating false positives
description: LOCATION: src/card.rs:21-23 FINDING: The URL_RE pattern r#"https://[^\s"'<>\])]+ "# used in extract_first_url matches any https URL in the HTML string, including URLs already inside href= attributes. When content_html contains a linkified mention like ..., the card fetch will target the first href URL in the document, which may be a mention or hashtag link rather than the post's intended canonical link URL. IMPACT: Posts that mention remote users before including a link will have their card fetched for the mention's profile URL instead of the post's link, producing a wrong or empty card. The card module's sister regex in content.rs correctly skips href= contents via LINK_RE; extract_first_url does not apply the same exclusion.
close_reason: Fixed: extract_first_url skips matches preceded by href= or src=
